examples: Progress in the study of rotifer resting eggs is reviewed.
Several significant changes were found in the composition of the rotifer, cladoceran and copepod assemblages.
The results show that there are protozoa(main infusorian)and mini-metazoa(rotifer and daphnia)communities in PFU.
